root.m_Talk_DEU: Humans are selfish, as they start into nothingness...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Humans are selfish, as they start into nothingness...

root.m_Talk_ENG: and pray for a miracle without ever paying the price.
root.m_Talk_DEU: and pray for a miracle without ever paying the price.
root.m_Talk_FRA: and pray for a miracle without ever paying the price.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But like those humans... I too, want a miracle.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But like those humans... I too, want a miracle.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But like those humans... I too, want a miracle.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then can I... make a wish?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then can I... make a wish?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then can I... make a wish?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This self-centered brother of yours already hopes that your wish will come true.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This self-centered brother of yours already hopes that your wish will come true.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This self-centered brother of yours already hopes that your wish will come true.
